THE RED MONKEY

— Old Rosie is the name given to our 1921 Aveling and Porter steam roller, that still sits in our yard in Herefordshire. Strong, reliable and so loved by everyone in the Westons family, we named this cloudy cider in her honour. Light, crisp and dry, this truly old fashioned cloudy cider is slowly matured and left unfiltered.

Blog

  • Spring Ales Are In April 20, 2026

    The warmer weather has arrived and so have our spring ales. We’ve just tapped three new casks from local breweries, each one brewed with the season in mind.

  • Quiz Night Returns Every Thursday March 10, 2026

    After a short break, our weekly quiz night is back — every Thursday from 8pm.
